positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest night scene. Central composition featuring massive, bioluminescent flora and fauna within a nebula-dusted sky. Dominant colors are deep indigo, electric teal, cosmic purple, and glowing gold highlights. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau organic lines and clean, modern graphic design. Focus on smooth silhouettes and strong contrast between the glowing elements and the deep shadows. The forest floor features stylized celestial river patterns. Highly intricate, tattoo flash quality, vector illustration, suitable for all-over garment printing. Clean lines, sharp focus, highly detailed.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, low detail, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, excessive realism, photography, cartoon, amateur, extra limbs, noise
